api_level.description: Android API level to install, for example 36. Defaults to latest stable.

avd_device.description: Android device profile to use when create_avd is true. Defaults to pixel_9.

avd_name.description: Android Virtual Device name to create when create_avd is true. Defaults to pixel_9.

avd_system_image.description: Android SDK system image package to install for the AVD. Defaults to system-images;android-<api_level>;google_apis;<host ABI>.

build_tools_version.description: Android SDK Build Tools version to install, for example 36.0.0. Defaults to latest stable.

create_avd.description: Create an Android Virtual Device after installing the SDK. Defaults to false.

extra_packages.description: Whitespace-separated additional sdkmanager packages to install.
